message:
fix: safeBigInt helper guards all remaining BigInt(Math.trunc()) crash sites

BigInt(NaN) and BigInt(Infinity) throw RangeError. The decode.ts and
executor.ts sites were fixed in e2e1a6a/97e2b9c, but 15 sites in
operators.ts, wasm-engine.ts, reader.ts, and partial-agg.ts were still
unguarded. Added safeBigInt(v) helper to types.ts that returns 0n for
non-finite inputs. Filter value paths return null/empty to skip the
WASM filter instead of crashing. Also removed nonexistent
umami-conformance.test.ts from vitest.config.ts.
